arts.ttl: Preview: Chesterfield vs. Harrogate Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Chesterfield and Harrogate Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Chesterfield's 2-1 win over Notts County last weekend was their third successive victory in the league, ending four straight defeats. Harrogate's 3-0 defeat at Newport at the weekend ended their thre...
